flavorText: Gloom Stalkers are hunters of darkness who strike first and vanish into shadow.

features.description: On the first round of combat, you gain an extra attack that deals an extra 1d8 damage; add your Intelligence modifier to Initiative; and on the first round you can make one additional attack as a bonus action.
Gain darkvision out to 60 feet, and while in darkness you are invisible to creatures that rely on darkvision to see you.
Gain proficiency in Wisdom saving throws if you do not already have it.
Once per turn, when you miss with a weapon attack, you can make another attack roll.
When a creature attacks you, you can use your reaction to impose disadvantage on that attack roll.

gloom-dread-ambusher.summary: Hit hardest in the opening heartbeat of a fight, before the enemy properly understands the danger.
gloom-dread-ambusher.description: Dread Ambusher is the iconic Gloom Stalker opener. It should feel like first-round violence delivered from the dark before the battle has fully settled.
gloom-dread-ambusher.effect: Opening-round tempo spike: initiative bonus, additional first-round attack pressure, and bonus opening damage.

gloom-umbral-sight.summary: Darkness becomes a natural hunting ground for you rather than a limitation.
gloom-umbral-sight.description: Umbral Sight is both stealth identity and battlefield identity. It is one of the reasons the subclass feels so different from a generic archer or skirmisher.

gloom-iron-mind.summary: Your mind hardens against manipulation, making you harder to turn aside from the hunt.
gloom-iron-mind.description: Iron Mind gives the subclass a mental resilience layer that fits its lone-stalker identity and keeps it operating under pressure.

gloom-stalkers-flurry.summary: A missed strike is less likely to waste your moment because the subclass stays relentless once it commits.
gloom-stalkers-flurry.description: Stalker’s Flurry helps the subclass preserve offensive tempo instead of losing it to one bad roll.
gloom-stalkers-flurry.trigger: Once per turn after missing with a weapon attack.

gloom-shadowy-dodge.summary: Slip partly into shadow at the moment of danger to make the attack line far less certain.
gloom-shadowy-dodge.description: Shadowy Dodge is a reactive survival tool that fits the subclass perfectly: elusive, hard to pin down, and strongest when the enemy thought they finally had you.
